description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3.5-jdk-8 Docker image and caching the Maven repository at .m2/repository. Define two stages: build and test, and set MAVEN_CLI_OPTS to '--batch-mode --errors --fail-at-end --show-version -DinstallAtEnd=true -DdeployAtEnd=true' and MAVEN_OPTS to configure the local repository and logging. In the build stage add a compile job that runs 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test-compile'. In the test stage add a verify job that runs 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify' and publishes any JAR files under target/*.jar as artifacts. No special rules or services are required.
